title: B2C Premium — Settings & Security
content:
Overview


The Settings page allows Premium users to manage their profile, password, two-factor authentication, notification preferences, theme, default page, and account deletion. It is divided into five sections.



Profile Settings


Displays the user's account information:


  • Display Name: Click Edit to change the name shown throughout the portal. Users can also update their avatar initials (2 letters)
  • Email Address: Shows a "Verified" badge — cannot be changed by the user
  • Subscription Plan: Current membership level (e.g., Premium Monthly, Premium Yearly, or Inactive)
  • Account Created: The date the account was registered


Security — Password


  1. Click Change next to Password
  2. Enter Current Password
  3. Enter New Password (minimum 8 characters with letters and numbers)
  4. Enter Confirm New Password
  5. Click Update Password

A "Last changed" date is displayed so users know when their password was last updated.



Security — Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)


Shows current 2FA status (Enabled or Disabled) with a button to toggle.


Enabling 2FA:


  1. Click Enable 2FA
  2. Step 1 — Scan QR: A QR code appears. Scan with Google Authenticator, Authy, or Microsoft Authenticator. A manual entry key is also provided
  3. Click I've scanned it — Next
  4. Step 2 — Verify: Enter the 6-digit code from the authenticator app. Click Verify & Enable
  5. Step 3 — Recovery Codes: Save the displayed backup codes. Each can be used once if the authenticator is lost. Click I've saved my codes to finish

Disabling 2FA:


  1. Click Disable 2FA
  2. Enter the current 6-digit code from the authenticator app
  3. Click Disable 2FA

If the user loses their authenticator and has no recovery codes, they must contact Tklesson support for a manual reset.



Notification Settings


Three toggle switches control notifications:


  • Email Notifications: Course updates and progress reports sent to the user's email
  • Quiz Reminders: Alerts for incomplete quizzes
  • Study Goals: Daily and weekly progress updates

All are enabled by default and can be toggled off individually.



Preferences


  • Theme: Choose Light, Dark, or Auto (follows system setting). The change applies immediately
  • Default Page: Choose which page loads when logging in — Dashboard, My Courses, or Progress


Danger Zone — Delete Account


At the bottom of the Settings page, a red-bordered section allows permanent account deletion:


  1. Click Delete Account
  2. Enter password to confirm identity
  3. Click Confirm Deletion

This permanently deletes the account and all associated data including course progress, quiz results, and subscription history. It cannot be undone.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "You can change your display name and avatar initials anytime from Profile Settings."
  • "When setting up 2FA, save your recovery codes — they won't be shown again."
  • "Notification toggles let you control which emails and alerts you receive."
  • "Dark mode is available in Preferences, or choose Auto to follow your system settings."
  • "Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. Make sure you want to proceed before confirming."
